prompt:
Goal: Create a sunlit photorealistic fantasy portrait in a European city park, showing a fashionable young woman sitting beside a small plant familiar. The mood is cute, magical, gentle, and “summoned companion” themed.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, realistic DSLR-style photography, shallow depth of field, warm morning sunlight, lens flare in the upper left, soft bokeh trees and city buildings in the background.

Main subjects: Include exactly 2 foreground subjects: 1 young woman and 1 small moss-and-plant familiar. The woman has a short blonde bob haircut with a small white flower hair clip on the right side, fair skin, and a relaxed seated pose. Her face is intentionally hidden by a plain opaque brown square censor block. She wears an oversized charcoal-gray off-shoulder T-shirt, white lace-trim shorts, and a brown leather shoulder bag strap crossing her torso. One shoulder is exposed. Her right hand rests near a small black chalkboard sign.

Familiar details: The familiar sits on the left side of the woman, about knee height, shaped like a squat plush creature with rounded pale stone-like legs, feet, and arms, but its body and head are covered in green moss, leaves, vines, and small white daisy-like flowers. Its face is also intentionally hidden by a smaller plain opaque beige-brown square censor block. It should look like a gentle tree spirit or plant sprite sitting beside her.

T-shirt graphic: On the woman’s shirt, print a cute anime-style rainy-day illustration with exactly 4 chibi characters: 1 central blonde girl holding an umbrella, 1 blue-haired girl on the left holding an umbrella, 1 teal-haired character at lower left, and 1 small brown-haired character on the right holding an umbrella. Add little puddles, raindrops, a watering can, and a small “Victory” flag. Use the Japanese headline 私の勝ちね and the smaller Japanese subtitle 雨降って地固まる. Make the shirt graphic readable but naturally printed on fabric.

Chalkboard sign: Place a black rectangular chalkboard leaning on the right side of the image, written in white handwritten Japanese chalk. Use the title-card content 名前: モスリン\n種族: 樹霊（木の精霊）\n性格: おっとり・甘えんぼう\n能力: 植物との会話\n小さな癒しの結界\nひとこと:「モスリンがいると\nなんだかどこでも\nおうちみたいだにゃ」. Add exactly 2 small chalk flower doodles near the lower left of the board.

Environment: The setting is a leafy urban park with a stone bench or planter edge, dappled sunlight on the ground, green shrubs, scattered small petals, tree trunks, and blurred pedestrians/buildings in the distance. Use realistic natural lighting, bright highlights, and soft shadows.

Style constraints: Photorealistic image with a whimsical fantasy companion, high detail, warm color grading, creamy bokeh, no extra people in the foreground, no watermark, no logo, no extra text beyond the T-shirt and chalkboard. Keep the censor blocks flat, opaque, and untextured.
